text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: How cute! ♪ Hey, you're pretty good at this. I might have to update my opinion of you... maybe.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Now, what should I do with her? There's, like, no
space left on my bed. Plus, she'd get crushed—I
use my plushies as pillows.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
She might fall off if I put her on my desk... Oh, I
could stand her up near my nail polish. That way
I'll def be careful.
